name: SK group, Za Za Bazaar, TH UK & Ireland Ltd and a few more.
message: You will get access to files these companies soon. Here is what we got: 70gb of corporate documents. We've taken lots of personal files (passports, social security cards, driver licenses, medicalinformation, address, phones and other information of numerous people), confidential files, projects, customer information, detailed accounting, confidentiality agreements, NDA, etc.
